zh-CN.title: Alist + WebDAV + Cloud Sync：打造群晖 NAS 自动同步网盘的完美方案
zh-CN.description: 面对网盘空间告急的困境，本文详细带你通过免费工具 Alist 聚合多平台云盘并提供标准的 WebDAV 服务，随后无缝对接群晖原生的 Cloud Sync 插件。该方案不仅实现了无需 PC 中转的 24 小时自动化极速同步工作流，还彻底摆脱数据焦虑。
zh-CN.content:
TL;DR: 面对网盘空间告急的困境，通过 Alist 聚合多平台云盘并提供标准的 WebDAV 服务，再对接群晖原生的 Cloud Sync 插件，即可实现无需 PC 中转的自动化同步工作流，极大提升了数据管理效率。

最近，我发现我的几个主流网盘（百度网盘、夸克网盘、阿里云盘）都相继发出了空间不足的预警。作为一名重度数据囤积者，清理文件显然不是首选方案，于是我将目光投向了家里的群晖 NAS。既然购入了 NAS，就应该让它发挥最大的价值——成为所有云端数据的终极归宿。本文将带你探索如何打造一套稳定、高效的网盘到本地的数据同步工作流。

面临的挑战：被困在 PC 中转站的同步流程

在探索自动化方案之前，我尝试过最原始的方法：在 PC 上打开网盘客户端下载文件，然后再通过 SMB 挂载或 Web 界面上传到 NAS。

这种“人工搬运”的模式存在明显的痛点：

  1. 设备依赖强：PC 必须保持 24 小时开机，否则同步就会中断。
  2. 带宽严重浪费：数据先经过 PC 再传给 NAS，相当于走了一段“冤枉路”，占用了不必要的局域网带宽。
  3. 磁盘焦虑：PC 本地硬盘空间往往有限，大批量同步时经常需要分区域、分批次操作。

我们需要的，正如在构建高效的 CI/CD 自动化流水线 时一样，是一种直接、原生且自动化的解题思路。

解决方案：为什么选择 Alist + Cloud Sync？

在排查了多种工具后，我发现 Alist 是目前打通各网盘之间关系的最佳桥梁。它不仅能挂载几乎所有的主流网盘接口，最关键的是它能提供标准的 WebDAV 服务。

虽然在开源社区里有很多人推荐使用 Rclone，但对于群晖用户来说，官方原生的 Cloud Sync 插件其实自带了 WebDAV 协议的底层支持。选择这套组合的理由很简单：

  • 原生稳定：Cloud Sync 由群晖官方维护，与 DSM 系统深度集成。
  • 配置简单：全图形化界面，无需记忆复杂的 CLI（命令行）命令。
  • 文档齐全：遇到问题容易排查，且原生支持计划任务排程和带宽流量控制。

至此，我们的数据流向就彻底串联了起来：云网盘 ↔ Alist (WebDAV) ↔ Cloud Sync (NAS)。

实战指南：自动化同步配置分解


图：Alist 桥接网盘与 NAS 的同步流程架构

步骤 1：在 Alist 中确认并开启 WebDAV 服务

Alist 安装完成后，默认已经开启了 WebDAV 服务。你需要收集并记录以下访问凭证：

  • 服务器地址：http://[NAS-IP]:5244/dav（若需跨越外网同步，请先配置内网穿透或端口转发映射）。
  • 认证账号与密码：你在 Alist 的管理员或用户登录凭据。

[!TIP]
建议在配置 NAS 之前，先使用 RaiDrive 或操作系统自带的“映射网络驱动器”功能进行初步的连通性测试，确保 /dav 路径能够正确挂载，并且能正常浏览已添加的网盘目录（如百度网盘、阿里云盘）。

步骤 2：使用群晖 Cloud Sync 对接 WebDAV

  1. 打开群晖 DSM 桌面，启动 Cloud Sync 套件（如未安装，请先在“套件中心”搜索安装）。
  2. 点击应用界面左上角的“+”号以创建一个新任务。
  3. 在云供应商列表中，向下滚动找到并选择 WebDAV。
  4. 填入如下的服务器详细连接信息：
    • 服务器地址：输入 Alist 的 WebDAV 完整链接（例如：http://192.168.1.100:5244/dav）。
    • 用户账号与密码：填入你在步骤 1 获取的 Alist 账号密码。
  5. 点击下一步，系统会自动验证凭据并识别该 WebDAV 节点下的所有外挂网盘（如阿里云盘、百度网盘等）文件夹。


图：在 Cloud Sync 中正确填写 Alist 的 WebDAV 链接与账户信息

步骤 3：配置任务细节与同步方向

在连接成功后，你需要为具体的同步流配置策略：

  • 本地路径：选择 NAS 上专门用于存放云盘备份的本地根文件夹。
  • 远程路径：在 WebDAV 目录树中选择你要进行同步的具体网盘路径。
  • 同步方向：
    • 仅下载远程更改：如果你只想把网盘的文件单向同步到本地作为冷备（强烈推荐此方案，能有效防止不小心误删网盘的线上文件）。
    • 双向同步：适合经常在两端同时进行增删改查的办公同步场景。
  • 排程设置：建议在凌晨或局域网设备空闲时段进行同步拉取，避免在白天占用高峰期的网络带宽。

进阶优化与避坑指南

  1. 多任务物理隔离：如果你同时挂载了夸克网盘、阿里云盘和百度网盘，建议在 Cloud Sync 中为它们分别创建三个独立的同步子任务。这在出现 API 报错时，能极大地降低排查难度并方便独立监控。
  2. 连接并发数限制：部分国内网盘（如百度网盘）对高频连接并发极其敏感，极易被封控。建议在 Alist 管理后台的“设置”中，适当调低连接并发数和相关缓存参数，防止触发供应商的防刷 API 限制。
  3. 安全最佳实践：如果你的 WebDAV 需要暴露到公网供异地使用，务必配置 HTTPS 反向代理，并定期更换高强度的复杂 WebDAV 密码。

结语与下一步

通过 Alist 配合群晖 Cloud Sync，我们成功地将原本分散在各个角落的云盘数据，高效且自动化地同步汇聚到了本地 NAS。这种方案的最大优点在于：它不仅解决了当下的存储警告问题，更是为未来的多平台数据沉淀打好了系统架构的底座——这与打造一个由 智能多 Agent 系统组成的开发架构 有着异曲同工的稳健感。

当技术工具被有效地串联成自动化数据流，不再需要人工参与“搬砖”和确认边界时，技术才真正发挥了其生产力效能。如果你也正在被网盘空间匮乏所困扰，不妨实践这套“官方原生 + 第三方桥接”的最佳解决方案，将 NAS 真正打造成为云端数据的避风港。

延伸阅读（站内其他工程化实践）：

  • 搭建个人数字花园：我的 Jekyll 博客构建与演进史
  • 为内网服务配置 SSL：免费 TLS 证书与 GitHub 项目结合实践

en.title: Alist + WebDAV + Cloud Sync: The Perfect Solution for Automatic Cloud Drive Synology NAS Synology
en.description: Faced with the dilemma of running out of cloud storage space, this article guides you through a detailed explanation of how to aggregate cloud drives from multiple platforms using the free tool Alist and provide standard WebDAV services, followed by seamless integration with Synology's native Cloud Sync plugin. This solution not only enables a 24/7 automated, high-speed synchronization workflow without the need for a PC, but also completely eliminates data anxiety.
en.content:
TL;DRFaced with the dilemma of running out of cloud storage space, Alist aggregates cloud drives from multiple platforms and provides standard WebDAV services. By connecting to Synology's native Cloud Sync plugin, an automated synchronization workflow can be achieved without the need for a PC, greatly improving data management efficiency.

Recently, I've noticed that several of my mainstream cloud storage services (Baidu Cloud, Quark Cloud, and Alibaba Cloud) have been issuing insufficient storage warnings. As a heavy data hoarder, cleaning up files is obviously not the first choice, so I turned my attention to my Synology NAS at home. Since I've purchased a NAS, I should make the most of it—making it the ultimate destination for all my cloud data. This article will guide you through building a stable and efficient workflow for syncing data from cloud storage to your local device.

The challenge: Synchronization processes stuck in PC relay stations

Before exploring automation solutions, I tried the most basic method: downloading files to the NAS by opening a cloud storage client on a PC, and then uploading them to the NAS via SMB mounting or a web interface.

This "manual handling" model has obvious pain points:

  1. Strong equipment dependenceThe PC must be kept on 24 hours a day, otherwise synchronization will be interrupted.
  2. Severe waste of bandwidthThe data first goes through the PC and then to the NAS, which is equivalent to taking a "detour" and consuming unnecessary local area network bandwidth.
  3. Disk anxietyPC local hard drive space is often limited, and large-scale synchronization often requires operations to be performed in different regions and batches.

What we need is precisely what we are building in terms of efficiency.CI/CD Automated Production LineLike time, it is a kind ofDirect, native, and automatedThe solution approach.

Solution: Why choose Alist + Cloud Sync?

After reviewing various tools, I found that Alist is currently the best bridge to connect different cloud storage services. It can not only support almost all mainstream cloud storage interfaces, but most importantly, it provides standard...WebDAV Serve.

Although many in the open-source community recommend using Rclone, for Synology users, the official native...Cloud SyncThe plugin actually comes with underlying support for the WebDAV protocol. The reason for choosing this combination is simple:

  • Natively stableCloud Sync is officially maintained by Synology and is deeply integrated with the DSM system.
  • Simple configurationIt features a fully graphical interface, eliminating the need to memorize complex CLI (command line) commands.
  • Complete documentationProblems are easy to troubleshoot, and it natively supports scheduled tasks and bandwidth control.

At this point, our data flow is completely connected:Cloud storage ↔ Alist (WebDAV) ↔ Cloud Sync (NAS)。

Practical Guide: Automated Synchronization Configuration Decomposition


Diagram: Synchronization process architecture between Alist bridged cloud storage and NAS

Step 1: Confirm and enable the WebDAV service in Alist.

After Alist is installed, the WebDAV service is enabled by default. You need to collect and record the following access credentials:

  • Server address：http://[NAS-IP]:5244/dav(If you need to synchronize across the external network, please configure intranet penetration or port forwarding mapping first).
  • Authentication account and passwordYour administrator or user login credentials in Alist.

[!TIP]
Before configuring the NAS, it is recommended to perform a preliminary connectivity test using RaiDrive or the "Map Network Drive" function built into the operating system to ensure.../davThe path can be mounted correctly, and the added cloud storage directories (such as Baidu Cloud and Alibaba Cloud) can be browsed normally.

Step 2: Connect to WebDAV using Synology Cloud Sync

  1. Open the Synology DSM desktop and start...Cloud SyncPackage (if not installed, please search for and install it in the "Package Center" first).
  2. Click the "+" sign in the upper left corner of the application interface to create a new task.
  3. In the list of cloud providers, scroll down to find and select.WebDAV。
  4. Enter the following detailed server connection information:
    • Server addressEnter the full WebDAV link for Alist (e.g.:http://192.168.1.100:5244/dav）。
    • Username and passwordEnter the Alist account password you obtained in step 1.
  5. ClickNext stepThe system will automatically verify credentials and identify all external cloud storage folders (such as Alibaba Cloud Drive, Baidu Cloud Drive, etc.) under this WebDAV node.


Image: Correctly filling in Alist's WebDAV link and account information in Cloud Sync

Step 3: Configure task details and synchronization direction

After the connection is successfully established, you need to configure a strategy for the specific synchronization stream:

  • local pathSelect the local root folder on the NAS specifically used for storing cloud disk backups.
  • remote pathSelect the specific cloud drive path you want to synchronize in the WebDAV directory tree.
  • Synchronization direction：
    • Download remote changes onlyIf you only want to sync files from the cloud drive to your local computer as a cold backup (this option is highly recommended as it can effectively prevent accidental deletion of online files from the cloud drive).
    • Two-way synchronizationSuitable for office synchronization scenarios where CRUD operations are frequently performed simultaneously on both ends.
  • Scheduling settingsIt is recommended to perform synchronous fetching in the early morning or during off-peak hours of local area network devices to avoid occupying network bandwidth during peak days.

Advanced Optimization and Pitfall Avoidance Guide

  1. Multi-task physical isolationIf you are simultaneously mounting Quark Drive, Alibaba Cloud Drive, and Baidu Cloud Drive, it is recommended to create three separate synchronization subtasks for each in Cloud Sync. This will greatly reduce the difficulty of troubleshooting when API errors occur and facilitate independent monitoring.
  2. Connection concurrency limitSome domestic cloud storage services (such as Baidu Cloud) are extremely sensitive to high-frequency concurrent connections and are easily blocked. It is recommended to appropriately lower the number of concurrent connections and related caching parameters in the "Settings" section of the Alist management backend to prevent triggering the provider's anti-fraud API restrictions.
  3. Security Best PracticesIf your WebDAV needs to be exposed to the public network for use in other locations, be sure to configure an HTTPS reverse proxy and regularly change to a strong and complex WebDAV password.

Conclusion and Next Steps

By using Alist in conjunction with Synology Cloud Sync, we successfully and automatically synchronized and aggregated cloud drive data that was previously scattered across various locations to our local NAS. The biggest advantage of this solution is that it...It not only solves the current storage warning problem, but also lays a solid foundation for the system architecture for future multi-platform data accumulation.—This is related to creating aDevelopment architecture consisting of intelligent multi-agent systemsIt has a similar sense of stability.

Technology truly unleashes its productivity when it's effectively linked into automated data flows, eliminating the need for manual data entry and boundary verification. If you're also struggling with limited cloud storage space, consider implementing this optimal solution of "official native + third-party bridging" to truly transform your NAS into a haven for your cloud data.

  • Building Your Personal Digital Garden: The History of My Jekyll Blog's Construction and Evolution
  • Configuring SSL for Intranet Services: Practical Application of Free TLS Certificates and GitHub Projects
